title: Oru Thalai Ragam Lyrics Idhu Namma Aalu

Idhu Namma Aalu Oru Thalai Ragam Song Lyrics
Singer: Simbu, Blaaze
Music Director: T.R Kuralarasan
Lyricist: T.R Kuralarasan, Blaaze

enakkaaga porandhaale
ava enkooda irundhaale
avala ippa
thaedi paakkuren
kanavilla avala

enakkaaga porandhaale
ava enkooda irundhaale
avala ippa
thaedi paakkuren
kanavilla

ava kooda irundha
naatkal yedhayum
marakka mudiyala

ava illaadha
oru vazhkaya
nenachu paakka
mudiyala

yen raagam
oru thala raagam
ada kadavule
yen indha sogam

yen kaadhal
romba paavam
romba paavam
enakku ava venum (2)

unkooda vazhavenu
nee saththiyam
panna

en kanvellaam
kalachchiputu

un pechchala
nammbi vittu naan

yemandhu poyi
dhevadhaasa naan
oththaya ninnen

ayyo
yemandhu poyi
dhevadhaasa naan
oththaya ninne

en idhayathil
vidhayaai vilundhaaye
oru poovaai neeye
valarndhaaye

en malare
yen vaadi pona

yen raagam
oru thala raagam
ada kadavule
yen indha sogam

yen kaadhal
romba paavam
romba paavam
enakku ava venum (2)

when I saw you
first girl,
you were so fine
I dont know

you made me feel
like million in one
not a one in

you be the one
who can change
my world and
may be change way

i gotta a feeling
that you can take

and I ain't saying
this just coz
am in love
this is coming out
loud from my bottom
of my heart girl.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Oru Thalai Ragam conveys feelings of love and longing, reflecting the emotional journey of the characters in Idhu Namma Aalu.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

The song plays during a pivotal moment in Idhu Namma Aalu, highlighting the protagonist's romantic feelings and memories.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features vocals by Blaaze and Simbu, with music composed by T.R Kuralarasan.

When was the song released?

Oru Thalai Ragam was released on February 2, 2016.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oru Thalai Ragam, the lyrical depth and melodic charm encapsulate the essence of love and nostalgia. Featured in Idhu Namma Aalu, the song reflects the protagonist's yearning and cherished memories with a loved one. The collaboration between Blaaze and Simbu adds a unique flair, making it a memorable romantic track. The emotions conveyed through the lyrics resonate deeply, evoking a sense of longing and affection.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oru Thalai Ragam from Idhu Namma Aalu is a captivating duet that beautifully blends the unique styles of Blaaze and Simbu. The song's romantic vibe and nostalgic lyrics create an enchanting atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Experience the magic of this collaboration that showcases the musical genius of T.R Kuralarasan.
stanzaMeanings: I was born for you, and if she was with me, I would look for her now, not in dreams.
I was born for you, and if she was with me, I would look for her now, not in dreams.
I cannot forget the days I spent with her.
I cannot imagine a life without her.
My melody is a leading melody; oh God, why this sorrow?
My love is very unfortunate, very unfortunate; I need her.
You should make a promise to live with me.
All my dreams are shattered, my heart is broken.
I trusted your words and came back later.
Oh, what a lie, oh God, I trusted you.
Oh, what a lie, oh God, I trusted you.
You have become a flower that has bloomed in my heart.
Oh my flower, where have you gone?
My melody is a leading melody; oh God, why this sorrow?
My love is very unfortunate, very unfortunate; I need her.
When I saw you first, girl, you were so fine; I don't know, but you blew my mind.
You made me feel like a million in one, not just one in a million; you are the one who can change my world and maybe change the way.
I have a feeling that you can take my breath away, and I am not saying this just because I am in love; this is coming out loud from the bottom of my heart, girl.
